visual_description: A close-up, profile shot focuses on a man with dark hair, wearing a light blue collared shirt and a striped tie. He has a somber and determined expression, looking down and to his left. The background is a dimly lit, out-of-focus interior, suggesting an office or industrial setting. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains static, holding the tight focus on the man's face. A man speaks in a low, serious, and determined voice, his words carrying a sense of solemn promise. "我会给大家一个交代" (I will give everyone an explanation). The scene then cuts to a wider shot, revealing the same man standing in what appears to be an office or control room. He is now facing forward, looking slightly to his right. Another man, also in a light-colored shirt and tie, stands beside him, looking in the same direction. In the foreground, the back of a person's head is visible. The background is filled with the soft, ambient hum of an office environment, with the faint glow of computer monitors visible. After a brief pause, the first man speaks again, his voice now filled with deep regret and apology, "对不起" (I'm sorry
